hero.title: Ciao, I'm Sonny
hero.intro: Software engineer, problem solver, and continuous learner

authorNote.text: I believe technology should empower people, not complicate their lives. My approach combines technical rigor with human-centered design — whether I'm architecting distributed systems or crafting user experiences.

about.text: I'm a software engineer specializing in full-stack development, cloud architecture, and developer tooling. With a background in computer science from USI Lugano, I've built scalable systems for startups and enterprises alike. My work spans from building robust backend infrastructure to creating intuitive frontends that users love. When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open source, or sharing knowledge with the developer community.

entries.description: Leading the development of cloud-native microservices architecture. Mentoring junior developers and establishing engineering best practices across teams.
Built scalable web applications using React and Node.js. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and improved deployment efficiency by 40%.
Developed customer-facing features for a SaaS platform. Collaborated with product team to define technical requirements and deliver iterative improvements.
Contributed to frontend development of e-commerce platforms. Worked on responsive design implementation and performance optimization.
Assisted in developing internal tools for data visualization. Gained hands-on experience with modern web technologies and agile methodologies.
Supported research projects in software engineering. Conducted literature reviews and assisted with experimental design for academic studies.
